dialogues.text:
──Wednesday. Morning of the 4th week.
Three weeks have passed since Nana started coming. Her body and mind are both changing steadily.
(She's been coming every week now... I can definitely call her a regular customer.)
(But with just her alone, I can't keep the business running. I need to find a way to attract more customers...)
Good morning! Please take care of me again today.
Good morning, Nana. Glad to see you looking energetic.
Yes! Last week's massage was really effective... My back pain is almost completely gone.
So... I told my friends about this place.
Really? You did?
Yes. When I told them it feels really good, everyone got interested...
But... I couldn't really mention the outfit...
(The possibility of new customers...! This is a great opportunity!)
So, how are you feeling today? Any areas that are bothering you?
Well... today... my stomach area feels tight...
I've been stress-eating a lot of sweets lately... and my stomach seems to be getting bloated...
Stomach tightness... In that case, let's try the treatment with you lying on your back today.
On my back... you mean? That's a different position from usual.
Yes. When you're on your back, I can properly loosen the muscles around your abdomen and regulate your internal organs.
Also, by sending waves from the front of your body, I can balance your autonomic nervous system.
From the front... that's kind of embarrassing...
But I trust you, sensei... I'll leave it to you.
Thank you. I'm sure you'll feel the effects.
And also... lately, my body feels flushed somehow...
I have trouble falling asleep at night... and I keep having strange dreams...
Hmm... that might be a sign of autonomic nervous system imbalance.

choices.label: Your body might be craving something

dialogues.text: That's true... I've had a lot of tests recently...
Stress is the root of all illness. Today I'll make sure to give you proper care so you can relax.
H-hormonal balance... you mean...?
Yes. Young women are especially susceptible to it. It's natural to become sensitive to bodily changes.
I-I see... I have been feeling strange in my body lately...
Huh? My body is craving something...?
Your body is honest. When something is lacking, it sends proper signals.
For example... when you lack physical contact or human warmth... your body can feel flushed.
N-no way...! I don't need anything like that...!
It's okay, nothing to be embarrassed about. It's a natural human desire.
Now then, let's get you changed. Today I'll be checking your abdomen area, so I'll be extra thorough.
Y-yes... understood.
(I've gotten used to this outfit... but today he'll be touching my stomach too...)
I've changed...
(Still a wonderful body... And somehow, her skin seems even more radiant than before...)
Good, all set. Today I'd like to try some new techniques.
New techniques... you mean?
Yes. There's a special manipulation technique to regulate internal organs. It might be a bit intense but...
I-I'll be fine... I trust you, sensei...
(Trust... That's a nice word.)
Well then, let's begin.
